_comment: Mumbai Building Bylaws — Based on DCPR 2034 (Development Control and Promotion Regulations)
_source: Maharashtra Government DCPR 2034, Chapter 6 — Building Regulations
_units: All distances in metres (m), areas in sq.m, percentages as numbers (50 = 50%)

_notes: Applicable to individual residential plots (row houses, bungalows, villas)
For plots up to 500 sq.m in residential zones R1/R2
FAR 1.5 is the base FSI; premium FSI available but not included here
Parking requirement waived for plots under 18m road width in older zones

parking.notes: 1 stall per unit for 2BHK and above. ECS (Equivalent Car Spaces) may be required for plots >300 sqm.

_notes: Applicable to ground-floor commercial (shops, offices) on commercial-zoned plots
Higher FAR available on arterial roads — simplified version used here

parking.notes: 2 ECS per 100 sq.m of commercial floor area.
